target_text: Audio fingerprint confirms live human performance. Not synthetic.
original_output: The audio is human-authored. The presence of a soothing piano melody and a male singing voice indicates a human-composed piece, as AI-generated music typically lacks the nuanced emotional expression and vocal nuances present here.
final_output: Audio fingerprint confirms live human performance. Not synthetic.
